attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  ,SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT           
  ,SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT            
  ,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
  ,AR_TRANSACTION_KEY            
  ,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
  ,BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD        
  ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
  ,GL_DT                         
  ,GL_POSTED_DT                  
  ,TRX_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CONV_DT   
  ,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
  ,FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT         
  ,FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT          
  ,CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT              
  ,DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT               
  ,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
  ,ATTRIBUTION_TYPE              
  ,BK_COMPANY_CD                 
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT        
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION_CNT  
  ,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
  ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
  ,SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
  ,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT        
  ,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY        
  ,SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID       
  ,AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
  ,TRX_CLASS_CD                  
  ,SS_CD                         
  ,REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD  
  ,RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,RU_SUBSCRIPTION_CD
  ,ATTRIBUTION_PCT 
  ,PRODUCT_QTY     
  ,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
  ,EDW_CREATE_USER               
  ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM

  ,TRX_SRC_CD /* Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution OM*/

  ,ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    
  ,PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT    
  ,POB_TYPE_CD

 ,NRS_TRANSITION_FLG

  FROM  $$WORKDB.W_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE WRTA
 WHERE
